response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Acme Software, which aligns with parts of the role. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, and cloud-native AI design at the staff level expected. Python is not listed among skills, and there is no clear evidence of customer-facing technical leadership or 8+ years specifically building AI-driven solutions.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong full-stack and polyglot engineering background with TypeScript/Node.js
Track record of technical leadership, mentoring, workshops, and open-source delivery
concerns: No demonstrated Python experience or RAG/vector database production work
Limited evidence of cloud-platform AI system design (AWS/GCP/Azure) at scale
Customer-facing discovery and enterprise delivery experience not shown
